title: geum montanorivale
intro: Geum montanorivale, also known as the alpine avens, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Geum montanorivale has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Geum montanorivale, such as teas and infusions, can be used to support health and well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and potential interactions.
